markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine the company context document for AI content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Narrative Shift:** The narrative must pivot from "Apple-first" to "cross-platform MDM." This is critical for competing now that rivals (Kanji, Jamf) are copying Fleet's strategy by adding Windows/Android support.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [**Persona Nuance:** Personas must differentiate between technical champions and budget-holding decision-makers. Content should equip champions to influence buyers, who often face non-product pressures (e.g., contract consolidation, CFO pressure for "free" Intune).](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Product Positioning:** The document must explicitly state Fleet is an MDM. Language like "built on OS Query" will be removed, as it reinforces the competitor-driven narrative that Fleet is *only* an OS Query manager.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The AI engine will focus on SEO-driven content. Brock will explore creating separate, manually-produced content (e.g., "how to sell Fleet to your boss") to address the champion/buyer dynamic.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Narrative: Cross-Platform MDM

  - [The document's "Apple-first" framing is outdated and must be removed.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Competitors (Kanji, Jamf) are now adding Windows/Android support, copying Fleet's cross-platform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [This eliminates Fleet's previous differentiator and makes a platform-agnostic narrative essential for future competition.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [The new narrative must position Fleet as an "Apple-first MDM" that is also a leading cross-platform solution.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

### Persona Refinement: Champion vs. Buyer

  - [The document's personas are too generic and must reflect the complex Champion-Buyer dynamic.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Insight:** A champion's influence varies widely. A champion with 100% decision-making power can still be overruled by a manager's non-product concerns (e.g., contract consolidation, budget).](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Equip champions to influence buyers.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**Buyer Challenges:** Navigating CFO pressure to consolidate tools (e.g., favoring "free" Microsoft Intune due to complex licensing) and justifying spend.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
      - [**Champion Challenges:** Overcoming user resistance to new tools (a "Stockholm Syndrome" effect) and educating management on Fleet's value.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Product Positioning: Explicitly an MDM

  - [The document must explicitly state that Fleet is an MDM.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To counter the competitor-driven narrative that Fleet is *only* an OS Query manager.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [**Language Edits:**](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
      - [Remove phrases like "built on OS Query" → reinforces the "only OS Query" narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [Remove jargon: "data instrumentation," "bring your own threat intelligence."](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [Replace vague terms: "asset tracking" → "hardware/software inventory."](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
      - [Correct inaccuracies: "FedRAMP" → Fleet is not FedRAMP certified.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=2850.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3231.0)
      - [Complete the review and edits of the company context document today.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3231.0)
      - [Notify Erik upon completion.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3285.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3285.0)
      - [Instruct the team to pause edits on the company context document.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3285.0)
      - [Update the separate persona document with insights from this session.](https://fathom.video/share/cahknD2aQzSLEcJ2gHajgsnVzCR7xzJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3285.0)
